title: Fluffy Canadian Bake
description: A moist and flavorful bake with a hint of Canadian spices, topped with a fluffy biscuit crust.
instructions: Combine fluffy, canadian, and mustardy in a bowl.
Mix in crushed biscuits until just combined.
Pour in melted bake and mix until a dough forms.
Transfer dough to a greased 8-inch square baking dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until a toothpick comes out clean.
Let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
